title: VeloraOS 1.10.21 - Public CA Access Hotfix
releaseNotes: Fixes HTTP 403 when Nginx serves the VeloraOS Local CA certificate.
Moves the public certificate outside the protected /var/lib/veloraos private state tree while keeping private TLS keys locked down.
Adds updater checks for public certificate directory traversal and file readability before the release is committed.
Keeps the HTTPS certificate download health check so future permission regressions roll back safely.
Preserves persistent TLS identity, seamless update reconnect, backend recovery, Chat stability and model intelligence.
